use-cases: Privacy Mode: Indicate that privacy mode is activated, hiding personal information or activity from other users.
Do Not Disturb: Show that notifications, alerts, or incoming messages are temporarily muted to prevent interruptions.
Hidden Content: Mark content that is concealed by default and requires user interaction to reveal or view.
Inactive Status: Denote that a user is currently inactive, away, or not actively engaging with the application.
Stealth Mode: Represent a feature or operation that runs discreetly in the background without being visible to others.
Accessibility Feature: Indicate an accessibility option designed to assist users with visual impairments or other accessibility needs.
